violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --In-use utensil was not properly stored during pauses in food preparation or dispensing. -Used ice cream scoop sitting on counter.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Clean drive up and lobby soda dispensers. -Clean ice catcher in big ice machine.--Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside line coolers.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean low shelving in kitchen area. -Clean front, sides and handles of coolers/freezers in kitchen. -Defrost burger freezer.
Storage of cleaned equipment and utensils. — --Clean equipment/utensil was not stored in a clean, dry manner to protect from contamination. -Clean shelving that stores clean dishes.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Clean floor edges including walk in cooler and freezer.
General premises. — --Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. -Keep back door closed tight.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Clean drive up window soda dispenser.--Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside 2 door upright fridge.--Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. -Clean inside, fronts and handles of all kitchen equipment and shelving. -Clean fan coolers in walk in cooler. -Defrost burger freezer.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Clean burger fryer filters.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Clean floor edges in kitchen and in walk in cooler.

General premises. — --Perimeter walls and roof did not effectively protect establishment from the weather and entry of insects, rodents, and other animals. -Bottom corner of back entry door needs weather stripping.

Food display and service. — --Potentially hazardous food was not kept at an internal temperature of 41F or below during display or service. -Keep ranch dressing bottle from prep table in refrigerator when not in immediate use. Note-Continue to monitor cold hold times monitor on prep table for sliced tomatoes etc.
